summary: Transferred 22 propositional files (11 new, 8 modified, 3 unchanged) from main to pr1/foundations-logic branch. Branch builds cleanly (2754 jobs, zero errors). All files are sorry-free. 2 cross-logic FromPropositional embedding files were excluded because the branch has incompatible Modal/Temporal Proposition type structures. ProofSystem.lean required no changes (HilbertInt/HilbertMin already present). Cslib.lean updated with 11 new import lines. Scope boundaries verified: no modal bundled classes, no hilbert_iff_nd_min.
